issues.description: TextTyper is never integrated into TypelessController or registered in DI, so SSE chunks are not typed into the foreground application. The feature contract required incremental text delivery and correction behavior, but the implementation only exists as an unused class and tests its internals in isolation.
evidence: TailSlap/TextTyper.cs defines TypeAsync, but no production code constructs TextTyper or calls TypeAsync.
TailSlap/Program.cs does not register TextTyper with the service collection.
git diff --name-only 4dbdd74..HEAD shows TextTyper.cs and tests were added, but no downstream typing integration beyond unused code.

summary: TextTyper itself is reasonably implemented and tested, but the milestone fails because it is dead code: nothing wires it into typeless transcription, so required user-visible typing behavior cannot occur.
